title: Add GEO_ICON and HYPERLOGLOG to attribute value type enums
diff:
--- a/gooddata-afm-client.json
+++ b/gooddata-afm-client.json
@@ AttributeLabelValueTypeDto enum @@
               "GEO_LONGITUDE",
               "GEO_LATITUDE",
               "GEO_AREA",
-              "IMAGE"
+              "GEO_ICON",
+              "IMAGE",
+              "HYPERLOGLOG"
--- a/gooddata-metadata-client.json
+++ b/gooddata-metadata-client.json
@@ AttributeLabel valueType enum @@
               "GEO_LONGITUDE",
               "GEO_LATITUDE",
               "GEO_AREA",
-              "IMAGE"
+              "GEO_ICON",
+              "IMAGE",
+              "HYPERLOGLOG"
